summary: Complete testing of Loyalty Program feature - Backend APIs 100% pass (22/22 tests), Frontend UI verified with all features working correctly

backend_api_tests: GET /api/loyalty/{client_id} - Returns client-specific loyalty with points and history
POST /api/loyalty/{client_id}/redeem - Redeems rewards when sufficient points
POST /api/appointments/{id}/checkout - Awards loyalty points (1 point per €10)
frontend_ui_tests: Login page displays logo correctly on left panel
Public booking page (/prenota) shows logo in header
Loyalty page (/loyalty) loads with stats cards (Punti Totali, Clienti Iscritti, Con Premi Disponibili)
Loyalty page shows rewards info (Sconto 20% Colorazione - 5 punti, Taglio Gratuito - 10 punti)
Loyalty page shows client list with progress bars
Client history dialog shows 'Punti Fedeltà' stat card
Checkout section in PlanningPage has loyalty points preview code (data-testid='loyalty-points-preview')

seed_data_creation: Test clients created and cleaned up during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loyalty program fully tested. Backend endpoints work correctly: GET /api/loyalty, GET /api/loyalty/config, GET /api/loyalty/{client_id}, POST /api/loyalty/{client_id}/redeem, POST /api/loyalty/{client_id}/use-reward/{reward_id}, POST /api/loyalty/{client_id}/add-points. Checkout correctly awards points (1 point per €10). Frontend loyalty page shows stats, rewards info, and client list. Client history dialog shows loyalty points. Navigation sidebar has loyalty link.

rewards.sconto_colorazione: 20% discount on coloring service, requires 5 points

visibility.client_card: Shows loyalty points in history dialog
visibility.checkout: Shows loyalty points preview in PlanningPage checkout section

features_verified.logo: Displayed correctly on login page and booking page header
